stories.title: Data center developer offers $10M community benefits package to Lyon Township
stories.dek: Verrus proposed a 1.8 million-square-foot facility and offered the $10 million in benefits amid local review of the project.

stories.title: Lima Township residents and officials halt proposed 1.4-gigawatt natural gas plant
stories.dek: The project was eyed near a large data center site; Consumers Energy confirmed no direct link after public pushback.

stories.title: Oracle seeks property tax exemption for expanding Saline Township data center project
stories.dek: The company applied for an Industrial Facilities Tax Exemption Certificate; the township board will hold a public hearing July 8.

stories.title: Report recommends new state policies to address data center concerns
stories.dek: Recommendations focus on easing public worries over energy, water and local impacts as projects advance.

stories.title: Senate Democrats introduce package of bills regulating hyperscale data centers
stories.dek: Measures address water use caps, renewable energy requirements, labor standards and transparency for large facilities.

meetings.topic: Public hearing on Oracle America application for Industrial Facilities Tax Exemption Certificate for data center project
